name: I have pre-existing asthma, can work chemicals make it an occupational illness claim in Millcreek?

mainEntity.name: I have pre-existing asthma, can work chemicals make it an occupational illness claim in Millcreek?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if work substantially aggravated it—prove with medical evidence.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if work aggravates it into a compensable condition under Utah's AOE/COE test.[1] Aggravation claims are viable with medical proof.[1] Key factors: Show work substantially worsened it; doctor opinion key; not just baseline flare.[1] Document exposures and get specialist eval. Attorney help clarifies aggravation vs. pre-existing denial.

description: Yes, if work substantially aggravated it—prove with medical evidence.[1]
